name: First-time user lands on an empty dashboard
description: Brand-new account: no jobs, no quotes, no clients yet. Dashboard should still feel inviting — empty states, a clear next action (talk to the assistant), and KPIs that read 0 without looking broken.

persona.name: Marcus Lee
persona.context: Heard about Paperwork Monster from a Facebook ad. First time logging in after verifying his phone.

preconditions: No quotes, contracts, invoices, jobs, or clients in the system
User just landed on /dashboard for the first time

steps.expect: Hero greeting uses first name and weekday/date; no flash of unstyled content
Active jobs 0, Owed $0, Quotes 0 — formatted (not 'NaN' or '$0.00') and not styled like errors

steps.action: Renders Activity, Active Jobs, Outstanding, Quotes Awaiting sections
steps.expect: Each shows a friendly empty state with a one-line nudge and a primary CTA pointing at /assistant
Navigates to /assistant with the threads sidebar empty and the chat composer focused

evaluationCriteria.check: Empty states are illustrated or iconic, not raw text dumps
Sidebar nav badges show 0 (or are hidden) — no stale numbers from another tenant
Hero greeting has a single h1; KPI labels are read by screen readers as label + value pairs
